top_signals.title: Global Bond Selloff Threatens Turmoil in Weakest Asian Economies
top_signals.summary: Three of Asia’s most vulnerable economies are showing rising strains as their central banks come under pressure to tighten policy even as the economic hit from the Iran-war oil shock deepens.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran War Oil Disruption Prompts Nigeria Producers to Lift Output
top_signals.summary: Nigerian oil companies are plowing windfall gains from the Iran-war crude rally into near-term extraction projects, boosting the drive by Africa’s top producer to double output within four years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK inflation dips in only temporary relief from Iran war impact - Reuters
top_signals.summary: UK inflation dips in only temporary relief from Iran war impact  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: France’s Moulin Says Deficit Situation Serious, Not Catastrophic
top_signals.summary: Emmanuel Macron’s nominee to run the Bank of France said the country has a serious challenge to reduce its budget deficit, but the situation isn’t catastrophic.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
